summary: Iteration 23: Frontend-only testing of Grid Master Sizing feature. All 6 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Grid Master Sizing card displays when platform is NIOS (verified)
Grid Master Sizing card displays when platform is Hybrid (verified)
Grid Master Sizing card does NOT display when platform is UDDI (verified - as expected)
Object count breakdown shows: Total Grid Objects (8.3M with 10% buffer), DHCP Lease Objects (2.8M, clients×2), DNS Objects (4.8M, DHCP×3 + Static×2), Discovery Objects (0, 1 per active IP)
GM Service Restriction Warning appears for TE-2326 models with DNS/DHCP roles (Atl-DC1, DAI-DC2, LA-DC3 all show NOT RECOMMENDED)
Minimum GM Model recommendation shows TE-4126 based on 60% capacity target (14.4M effective capacity of 24M)
Current utilization percentage displayed (35%) with green color indicator (≤60%)
GM Service Restrictions table shows color-coded model restrictions: TE-926 (green ✓ OK), TE-1516 (yellow ≤8 mbrs), TE-1526 (red ✗ No), TE-2326 (red ✗ No), TE-4126 (red ✗ No)
critical_code_review_comments: tokenData.js correctly implements GM sizing functions (lines 68-183)
niosGridConstants defines correct values: maxDbUtilizationPercent=60, bufferPercent=10, dhcpLeaseObjectsPerClient=2, dnsRecordsPerDhcpClient=3, dnsRecordsPerStaticClient=2
gmServiceRestrictions correctly defines service restrictions for TE-926 (OK), TE-1516 (≤8 members), TE-1526+ (NOT RECOMMENDED)
calculateGMObjects correctly calculates: dhcpLeaseObjects = clients × 2, dnsObjects = DHCP×3 + Static×2, totalObjects with 10% buffer
findMinimumGMModel correctly finds minimum model based on 60% capacity target and returns utilization percentage
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx correctly implements gmSizing useMemo (lines 378-404) that calculates GM objects and service warnings
GM Sizing card UI (lines 1176-1281) correctly displays: service warnings, object breakdown, minimum GM model, utilization percentage with color indicator, and service restrictions table
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 6 sites (3 Data Centers with GM/GMC roles using TE-2326, 3 Locations with DNS/DHCP roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grid Master Sizing feature verified: 1) Card displays for NIOS and Hybrid platforms, hidden for UDDI. 2) Object counting formulas correct (DHCP×2, DNS=DHCP×3+Static×2, Discovery=1 per IP). 3) GM Service Restriction Warning shows for TE-1526+ models. 4) Minimum GM Model recommendation based on 60% capacity target. 5) Utilization percentage with color indicator (green ≤60%, red >60%). 6) Service restrictions table with color-coded models.

gm_sizing_card_visibility.uddi_platform: Card NOT visible (as expected - UDDI doesn't have GM)

gm_service_restriction_warning.warning_text: NOT RECOMMENDED - GM should be dedicated to grid management only
